name: AD1 Holdings Limited
summary: AD1 Holdings Limited provides software services and technology platforms. The company provides an online platform that links employers and job candidates directly to live job opportunities on employer websites in Australia. It also offers utilities software and managed services. The company was formerly known as ApplyDirect Limited and changed its name to AD1 Holdings Limited in December 2019. AD1 Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Hawthorn, Australia.
